title: helichrysum hirtum
intro: Helichrysum hirtum, also known as the rough yellow everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the daisy family. It is widely used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Helichrysum hirtum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving circulation, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce scarring. Helichrysum hirtum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
